generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, acceleration, and motor current data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
]

instance RobotSensorDataMQTTStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current data (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for the motor component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for the motor component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for the gearwheel component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for the gearwheel component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for the cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for the cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SystemOutputAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data for the system output of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataMQTTStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for the motor component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for the gearwheel component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for the cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the motor component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the gearwheel component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the first axis components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from robot sensors to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, VisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling the first axis of the robot"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of robot axis data and insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction models (white-box and black-box) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time motion accuracy improvement for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard for understanding physical relationships of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipsInsight
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters identified from data comparison used to enhance robot control accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of control parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing insights into physical relationships for maintenance and control optimization"
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Single centralized digital shadow instance for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, SysMLModelingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, VisualizationService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization with live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, data streaming via MQTT, processing components (Simulink models), and visualization dashboard to create a digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live data during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs. measured data for friction identification; multi-physics-aware modeling to account for load, temperature, and time-dependent effects."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset modeling; SysML for system engineering modeling."
]
